# @tiktool/live

> Connect to any TikTok LIVE stream and receive real-time events (chat, gifts, viewers, battles, follows) using WebSocket.

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { TikTokLive } from '@tiktool/live';

const live = new TikTokLive({
    uniqueId: 'username',     // TikTok username (without @)
    apiKey: 'YOUR_API_KEY',   // Get free key at https://tik.tools
});

live.on('chat', e => console.log(`${e.user.uniqueId}: ${e.comment}`));
live.on('gift', e => console.log(`${e.user.uniqueId} sent ${e.giftName}`));
live.on('member', e => console.log(`${e.user.uniqueId} joined`));
live.on('roomUserSeq', e => console.log(`Viewers: ${e.viewerCount}`));

await live.connect();
```

## Install

```bash
npm install @tiktool/live
```

## How It Works

1. Your app calls `api.tik.tools` once to sign the connection URL (requires API key)
2. Your app connects directly to TikTok's WebSocket from YOUR IP
3. Live events (chat, gifts, etc.) stream directly to your app via protobuf
4. The sign server never sees your data — only generates cryptographic signatures

## Constructor Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `uniqueId` | `string` | — | TikTok username (without @) |
| `apiKey` | `string` | — | Required. API key from tik.tools |
| `signServerUrl` | `string` | `https://api.tik.tools` | Sign server URL |
| `agent` | `http.Agent` | — | HTTP agent for proxy support |
| `autoReconnect` | `boolean` | `true` | Auto-reconnect on disconnect |
| `maxReconnectAttempts` | `number` | `5` | Max reconnect attempts |
| `heartbeatInterval` | `number` | `10000` | Heartbeat interval (ms) |
| `debug` | `boolean` | `false` | Debug logging |

## Events

### Live Events
- `chat` — Chat message: `{ user, comment }`
- `member` — User joined: `{ user, action }`
- `like` — User liked: `{ user, likeCount, totalLikes }`
- `gift` — Gift sent: `{ user, giftName, diamondCount, repeatCount, combo, repeatEnd }`
- `social` — Follow/share: `{ user, action }`
- `roomUserSeq` — Viewer count: `{ viewerCount, totalViewers }`
- `battle` — Battle status: `{ status }`
- `battleArmies` — Battle teams with scores
- `subscribe` — New subscriber: `{ user, subMonth }`
- `emoteChat` — Emote in chat: `{ user, emoteId }`
- `envelope` — Treasure chest: `{ diamondCount }`
- `question` — Q&A question: `{ user, questionText }`
- `control` — Stream control: `{ action }` (3 = stream ended)
- `room` — Room status change
- `liveIntro` — Stream intro: `{ title }`
- `rankUpdate` — Rank update
- `linkMic` — Link Mic event
- `unknown` — Unrecognized event type

### Connection Events
- `connected` — Connected to stream
- `disconnected` — Disconnected (code, reason)
- `roomInfo` — Room info received
- `error` — Error occurred

## Methods

- `connect()` → `Promise<void>` — Connect to livestream
- `disconnect()` → `void` — Disconnect
- `connected` → `boolean` — Connection status (getter)
- `eventCount` → `number` — Total events received (getter)
- `roomId` → `string` — Current room ID (getter)

## Proxy Support

```typescript
import { HttpsProxyAgent } from 'https-proxy-agent';

const live = new TikTokLive({
    uniqueId: 'username',
    apiKey: 'YOUR_API_KEY',
    agent: new HttpsProxyAgent('http://user:pass@proxy:1234'),
});
```

## Rate Limits

| Tier | Rate Limit | WS Conns | WS Duration | WS Connects | Price |
|------|-----------|----------|-------------|-------------|-------|
| Sandbox | 5/min | 1 | 60 sec | 10/hr · 30/day | Free |
| Basic | 60/min | 3 | 8 hours | 60/hr · 200/day | From $7/wk |
| Pro | 120/min | 50 | 8 hours | Unlimited | From $15/wk |
| Ultra | Unlimited | 500 | 8 hours | Unlimited | From $45/wk |

Sandbox is for API verification only — use Basic or higher for production.

## Live Captions (Speech-to-Text)

AI-powered real-time transcription and translation for TikTok LIVE streams. Features: auto-detect language, speaker diarization, real-time translation, streaming partial + final results.

```typescript
import { TikTokCaptions } from '@tiktool/live';
const captions = new TikTokCaptions({ uniqueId: 'streamer', apiKey: 'KEY', translate: 'en' });
captions.on('caption', e => console.log(e.text));
await captions.start();
```

Caption credits are pay-as-you-go add-ons (1 credit = 1 min):
- Starter: 1,000 credits — $10
- Creator: 5,000 credits — $35
- Agency: 20,000 credits — $100

Get your API key at https://tik.tools

## Links

- Homepage: https://tik.tools
- Docs: https://tik.tools/docs
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tiktool/live
- GitHub: https://github.com/tiktool/live
